scenes.voice_text: GluMira helps schools and care organisations support children with diabetes safely and confidently. You don't need to be a medical expert. GluMira gives you exactly what you need to act correctly.
scenes.visual_note: A school building with a protective shield animation. Warm, reassuring. Professional.

scenes.voice_text: The School Care Plan generator creates a complete, clinical-grade emergency document for each child in your care — their hypo thresholds, treatment steps, dietary restrictions, EpiPen location, and emergency contacts. It updates automatically when the parent changes anything in their child's profile.
scenes.subtitle_text: Auto-generated care plans. Always up to date.
scenes.visual_note: Care plan PDF building itself — fields populating with real data. Print and Share buttons visible.

scenes.voice_text: Each child's dietary restrictions and allergy protocols are clearly documented — gluten-free, dairy-free, glucose tablet allergies, EpiPen requirements. Nothing is left to assumption.
scenes.subtitle_text: Dietary restrictions. Allergy protocols. Nothing assumed.
scenes.visual_note: Allergy section of care plan highlighted. Clear icons for each restriction. Emergency protocol steps visible.

scenes.voice_text: GluMira supports multiple children under one organisation profile. Each child's care plan is separate, current, and accessible instantly — from any authorised device.
scenes.visual_note: Organisation dashboard showing multiple student cards. Each with a status indicator. Clean, list-based layout.

scenes.voice_text: When an incident happens, staff know exactly what to do. No guessing. No searching. The protocol is clear, accessible, and specific to that child.
scenes.subtitle_text: Clear protocols. Specific to each child.
scenes.visual_note: Step-by-step hypo response protocol displayed on a tablet screen. Large text. Clear steps. Calm visual design.

scenes.voice_text: Let's set up your organisation profile and add your first student. It takes less than five minutes.
scenes.visual_note: Clean CTA screen. School icon. Single button.
